_meta.description: Manual overrides for the retroversion canonical selection. Used when statistical alignment picks a suboptimal candidate due to tied scores or rare NT occurrences.

πνεῦμα.source: LXX Gen 1:2; the standard biblical equivalent; Delitzsch uses both רוח and קדש for 'πνεῦμα ἅγιον' compounds, tied in co-occurrence

ζωή.source: LXX Gen 2:7 נשמת חיים; masculine plural absolute; Delitzsch's חיי is construct state 'life of'

Ἐμμανουήλ.source: Isa 7:14 MT עמנואל, direct match; not עלמה (young woman, paired in Mt 1:23 but not the name itself)

Ἁρμαγεδών.source: har-magedon = Mount Megiddo; Rev 16:16 'called in Hebrew Harmagedon'

Μαρία.source: Miriam, sister of Moses; used throughout

Βαραββᾶς.source: Aramaic 'son of the father'; compound form from Delitzsch Maqef tokenization (verified via fix)

Γολγοθᾶ.source: Aramaic 'place of the skull'; Delitzsch preserves the aramaism

Βηθλέεμ.source: Bethlehem 'house of bread', Mica 5:1 בית לחם; compound form after Maqef fix

Γαλιλαία.source: Isa 8:23 גליל; but 86 = אלהים for the full form Galilee in Greek isopsephy (separate finding, Mt 4:15)
